name: memory
description: Agentic Memory — LanceDB + FastEmbed. LTS stores summaries, STS stores full conversation chains. Local embeddings (BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5), no external API calls.

tools.name: memory.index
tools.description: Index a trace (content + metadata) into LTS (summaries) or STS (full conversation chain). Generates local embedding and inserts into LanceDB.

store.description: Store: ltm (long-term memory) or stm (short-term memory)

tools.name: memory.search
tools.description: Semantic search over LTS and/or STS. Returns top 5 results as JSON. Uses local embedding.

tools.name: memory.delete
tools.description: Delete a specific document by id, or purge all documents from a store.

id.description: Document id to delete. Omit to purge the entire store.

tools.name: memory.prune
tools.description: Remove stale entries from the diary store older than max_age_secs (default 86400 = 24 h). Returns count of pruned rows.

max_age_secs.description: Age threshold in seconds (default: 86400 = 24 h). Documents older than this are deleted.

tools.name: memory.diary_write
tools.description: Write a stub diary row (zero vector placeholder) for a completed ReAct turn. Called fire-and-forget by Agent after each final answer. Compaction back-fills real embeddings, keywords, and summaries in a future pass.

file_path.description: Path to the diary markdown file on disk

keywords.description: Optional keyword list; defaults to [] (filled at compaction)
